session_summary: Fixed per-game LLM low SNR bug: wrong key names in _build_game_prompt() (move_number->ply, san->move_san, cp_loss->centipawn_loss). Fixed accuracy=0.0 and empty phase_stats by adding _compute_accuracy() and _compute_phase_stats() to GameAnalysis.auto_annotate(). Repaired 18 stale cache files. Created contract tests (tests/test_prompt_contract.py, 13 tests) that verify key consistency between Stockfish→JSON→LLM prompt. GT-059, P44 added to postmortem.
